channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ‘America Bad’ Is Not the Right Theme for America’s 250th
item.description: Instead of a theme focused on oppression, consider Spain’s little-known but crucial support for the Patriots during the Revolution.

item.title: A Golden Opportunity to Destabilize Planned Parenthood
item.description: Republicans should not waste this chance.

item.title: What Sweden’s Attempt to Course-Correct on Migration Shows the West
item.description: The country’s new conduct legislation rightly recognizes that residency is a privilege.

item.title: Dems Call for Court Packing After SCOTUS Rules ‘Temporary’ Really Means Temporary
item.description: Democrats are again calling for the Supreme Court to be expanded and reformed after the high court affirmed Thursday in a 6-3 decision that temporary means temporary.
